character_pose_transparent_png.notes: Use approved production pose as reference input. Do not route Hi-Tide Harry-style identity-locked poses to Leonardo.

multi_pose_character_set.notes: Reference image required for every generated pose.

hero_still_environment.notes: Choose per site by aspect ratio, prompt specifics, and stylistic fit.

hero_still_branded_story.notes: Exact copy belongs in HTML/SVG overlay, not raster generation.

atmospheric_background_loop.notes: Leonardo is validated for cinematic ambience/background loops, not foreground mascot identity.

style_consistent_batch_stills.notes: Validated for non-character scene style variation.

photoshop_finishing.notes: Photoshop is a finishing station, not a generator. adb-mcp openFile is currently failed and tracked in the benchmark backlog.

providers.label: OpenAI Responses
providers.description: Validated reference-image generation path for identity-locked character poses and transparent PNG assets.

capabilities.label: Reference-image generation/edit
capabilities.notes: Validated with approved production pose reference. Studio route is follow-up; do not use legacy text-only pose generation for identity-locked characters.

capabilities.label: Transparent PNG output
capabilities.notes: Validated for Hi-Tide Harry pose variants.

capabilities.label: Branded hero still
capabilities.notes: Validated against Imagen comparator; select per site.

providers.label: Claude SVG
providers.description: Studio-native vector asset generation for logo systems, icons, favicons, dividers, and lightweight illustrative assets.

capabilities.label: Vector asset generation
capabilities.notes: Best for SVG-style identity assets and decorative components.

providers.label: Google AI Studio
providers.description: Google image and video generation stack exposed through Gemini, Imagen, and Veo.

capabilities.label: Text to image
capabilities.notes: Primary route for hero/environment stills and reusable media images. Identity-locked character poses route to OpenAI Responses.

capabilities.label: Text to video
capabilities.notes: Generates a still and animates it into a short clip.

capabilities.label: Image to video
capabilities.notes: Animates an existing uploaded or generated still into a short clip.

capabilities.label: Character consistency
capabilities.notes: Not the validated primary route for identity-locked character poses in current Studio routing. See canonical media routing doc.

providers.label: Leonardo
providers.description: Visual-first image and video generation with reference-guided workflows and custom training paths.

capabilities.label: Text to image
capabilities.notes: Officially available, but not yet routed through Studio endpoints.

capabilities.label: Image guidance
capabilities.notes: Supports style/content references, but Phoenix Character Reference failed Hi-Tide Harry identity consistency. Do not route identity-locked character poses here without new validation.

capabilities.label: Image to video
capabilities.notes: Officially available, but not yet wired into Studio server routes.

capabilities.label: Custom models
capabilities.notes: Potential long-term route for stable brand character consistency.

providers.label: Adobe Firefly API
providers.description: Adobe Firefly Services APIs for image generation, custom models, composites, upscale, and video.

capabilities.label: Text to image
capabilities.notes: Repo has a Firefly image script, but Studio does not use it as a primary Media route yet.

capabilities.label: Custom models
capabilities.notes: Strong candidate for brand character and style consistency when access is enabled.

capabilities.label: Upscale
capabilities.notes: Officially available in current Firefly Services docs.

capabilities.label: Generate video
capabilities.notes: Officially available, but not yet wired into Studio.

providers.label: Adobe Firefly Web
providers.description: Creative Cloud web-app path for Firefly image and video features.

capabilities.label: Image generation
capabilities.notes: Usable through the web surface, but not a dependable primary automation path.

capabilities.label: Video generation
capabilities.notes: Present in Adobe surfaces, but Studio should treat it as secondary until automation is hardened.

providers.label: OpenRouter
providers.description: Unified routing layer for multiple image and video models.

capabilities.label: Text to image
capabilities.notes: Official image generation support is available through OpenRouter.

capabilities.label: Text to video
capabilities.notes: Official video generation API is available through OpenRouter.

capabilities.label: Image to video
capabilities.notes: Useful as a future model-routing surface once Studio adds first-class support.

providers.label: Photoshop / MCP
providers.description: Photoshop automation and editing path through plugin/MCP integration.

capabilities.label: Image editing
capabilities.notes: Available in principle, but plugin reliability remains a blocker.
